slices.title: Migrate to timezone-aware datetimes
slices.jtbd: When generating timestamps, I want to use timezone-aware datetime objects, so that we avoid discrepancies with timezone-aware clients and prevent Python 3.12 deprecation warnings.
slices.acceptanceCriteria:
Given a backend module generates a timestamp, When the code is executed, Then it must use a timezone-aware datetime like datetime.now(timezone.utc).
Given the codebase is analyzed, When we search for datetime.utcnow(), Then there must be 0 occurrences.
